product_name: Smylo Adult Wet Cat Food Trial Box (1+ Yrs) with Fish & Chicken Broth | Chicken, Tuna & Mackerel Recipes | Grain Free, No Preservatives | Omega 3 & 6 for Shiny Fur | Wet Food for Cats, Cat Food Topper
product_description: The Smylo Adult Wet Cat Food Trial Box (1+ Yrs) is purrfect for fussy cats, allowing them to try a variety of delicious recipes. It includes a pouch of each of our 4 wet cat food recipes: Tuna & Salmon, Chicken & Chicken Liver, Chicken & Tuna, and Mackerel & Kanikama, along with a clip, spoon, and a fun cat toy. The included HomeStyle Chicken and Fish Bone Broth is 100% natural and vet-formulated, slow-simmered for over 10 hours with carrots, kale, turmeric, and herbs to provide healthy liquid collagen, protein, and gut-friendly nutrients. The bone broth, enriched with natural collagen, amino acids, and turmeric, supports joint flexibility, bone strength, and better mobility, making it ideal for senior cats, indoor cats, or for recovery support. Smylo Adult wet food recipes are free from artificial preservatives, grains, fillers, or harmful additives, and contain no by-products. They are rich in taurine and protein, made with non-GMO ingredients, ensuring a healthy pet food. Made by vets, Smylo offers visible health improvements in just 2 weeks; 85% of cat parents report better digestion, increased energy, shinier coats, easier weight maintenance, less shedding, reduced litter box odors, and fewer hairballs for a healthier, happier cat. Smylo’s cat product adheres to FSSAI guidelines and meets international standards, including AFFCO and FEDIAF. Our kitchens are HACCP, ISO 9001:2015, and GMP certified, ensuring the highest quality and safety.

scenes.name: The Fussy Eater Dilemma
scenes.audioPrompt: Does your cat turn their nose up at mealtime? Dealing with dull fur or low energy?
scenes.imagePrompt: A domestic short-hair cat, appearing slightly lethargic and uninterested, turning its head away from a generic bowl of dry cat food, with dull fur. In the background, a young adult cat owner looks slightly concerned or frustrated.
scenes.videoScript: A close-up shot of a domestic short-hair cat slowly turning its head away from a bowl of generic dry cat food, showing disinterest. The camera then pans slightly to the owner's face, displaying a subtle look of frustration or worry.

scenes.name: Introducing the Smylo Solution
scenes.audioPrompt: Introducing the Smylo Adult Wet Cat Food Trial Box! A variety of delicious, vet-formulated recipes picky eaters love.
scenes.imagePrompt: The Smylo Adult Wet Cat Food Trial Box (1+ Yrs) with vibrant packaging, being opened to reveal various colorful pouches of wet food, a branded clip, a spoon, and a fun cat toy, all neatly arranged.
scenes.videoScript: A pair of hands gently opening the Smylo Adult Wet Cat Food Trial Box, revealing the neatly packed pouches of different recipes, the branded clip, a spoon, and a small cat toy. The camera briefly focuses on the variety of pouch labels.

scenes.name: Nutrition & Broth Power
scenes.audioPrompt: Grain-free, no preservatives, and enriched with Omega 3 & 6. Plus, our natural HomeStyle Bone Broth for joint health and digestion!
scenes.imagePrompt: A modern ceramic cat bowl filled with Smylo wet cat food, showing rich, moist texture with visible pieces of chicken and fish. Next to it, a clear glass bowl or cup contains Smylo's golden-brown bone broth, steaming gently with subtle hints of carrots and herbs.
scenes.videoScript: A slow zoom into a modern ceramic cat bowl filled with Smylo wet cat food, highlighting its rich texture. Then, a smooth transition to a close-up of Smylo's golden-brown bone broth steaming gently, emphasizing its natural, wholesome appearance.

scenes.name: The 2-Week Glow Up
scenes.audioPrompt: In just two weeks, witness the Smylo Glow Up! Shinier fur, increased energy, and better digestion, reported by 85% of cat parents!
scenes.imagePrompt: A healthy, energetic domestic short-hair cat with noticeably shiny, well-groomed fur, eagerly eating Smylo wet food from a bowl. In a second frame, the same cat is playing actively with a toy, jumping playfully, looking alert and vibrant.
scenes.videoScript: A quick montage: First, a domestic short-hair cat with visibly shiny fur eagerly lapping up Smylo wet food. This transitions to the same cat energetically batting at a toy, jumping, and displaying playful, vibrant behavior.

scenes.name: Happy Cat, Happy Life
scenes.audioPrompt: Give your cat the healthy, happy life they deserve. Smylo is vet-made and quality assured!
scenes.imagePrompt: A young adult cat owner, smiling warmly, gently petting a vibrant and playful domestic short-hair cat, who is purring contentedly and rubbing against the owner's hand. The cat's fur is exceptionally shiny.
scenes.videoScript: The young adult cat owner, with a warm smile, gently stroking the now visibly vibrant and playful domestic short-hair cat. The cat leans into the touch, purring, showcasing its healthy coat and happy demeanor.

scenes.name: Call to Action
scenes.imagePrompt: The Smylo Adult Wet Cat Food Trial Box prominently displayed against a clean, appealing background. The Smylo brand logo is clearly visible, with a call-to-action overlay.
scenes.videoScript: A static shot of the Smylo Adult Wet Cat Food Trial Box, beautifully presented. The Smylo brand logo is clearly visible on the packaging, with text overlay 'Try Smylo Today!' or a similar call to action.
